# Code of Conduct

This project follows the standards expected in the Nuitka community: be
respectful, constructive, and focused on the work.

## Expected Behavior

- Use welcoming and inclusive language.
- Be respectful of different viewpoints and levels of experience.
- Keep technical disagreement focused on code, behavior, tests, and project
  goals.
- Accept constructive feedback and help improve the project for future users.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, intimidation, personal attacks, or discriminatory language.
- Sexualized language or imagery.
- Publishing private information without explicit permission.
- Sustained disruption of issues, pull requests, reviews, or other project
  spaces.

## Scope

This code of conduct applies in project spaces, including issues, pull requests,
reviews, discussions, and other channels used for project collaboration.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove, edit, or reject comments, commits, issues, pull
requests, and other contributions that do not align with this code of conduct.
They may also temporarily or permanently restrict participation when needed to
protect the project community.

If you need to report a concern, contact a project maintainer through an
appropriate private channel. Do not use public issues for reports that include
private information.
